series_metadata.series_description: OHIO ELECTION LAW COMPLAINTS FILED PURSUANT TO R.C.§3517.08 THROUGH §3517.22 AND §3599.03. THESE COMPLAINTS INVOLVE CANDIDATES FOR POLITICAL OFFICES THROUGHOUT OHIO AND POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEES. THE FILES CONTAIN A REFERRAL BY THE SECRETARY OF STATE''S OFFICE OR THE COUNTY BOARD OF ELECTIONS AND/OR AN AFFIDAVIT OF COMPLAINT FILED BY THE COMPLAINANT IN ADDITION TO ANY RESPONSES TO ALLEGED VIOLATIONS AND THE DETERMINATION OF THE MATTER.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: MAINTAIN IN OFFICE CASE HAS REACHED FULL DISPOSITION BY COMMISSION
